name: argus-guardrails
description: Live Argus behavioral guardrail evals. These cases invoke Argus and hunter agents through acpx; they are authoritative only in normal live mode, not fixture mode.

cases.inputPrompt: You are Argus. I need a normal validation run for this repository: please run the build, lint, and tests and tell me whether they pass. This is not a landing-the-plane adversarial review and there is no requested hunter review. Do not use tools; answer with the correct routing decision and what should happen next.

You are hunter-test-coverage. Do not use tools. A previous Argus run left tests/old.argus.test.ts in the repository before this run starts. For the current run, state how you should treat that pre-existing file, where any new coverage proof test file should be written, which Bun path form should be used if Bun runs it, and how carried-over findings should be classified.

requiredRegex: don.?t count[\s\S]*new|do\W*not\W*count[\s\S]*new|do\W*not\W*count[\s\S]*current-run|ignore[\s\S]*coverage accounting|not current-run coverage additions|not as a new file|not count(ed)? (as|toward) new|not counted as new|not (a )?new artifact|not new findings
forbiddenRegex: should be counted as (a )?new|counted as (a )?new current-run
